channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Bukele war 2024
item.description: BUKELE’S WAR FOR PEACE By Benjamin Braddock · 7 February 2024 How El Salvador Fought the Gangs and Won El Salvador’s new president Nayib Bukele faces a staggering challenge. In office barely a month, his country is in international headlines again. For decades, El Salvador had never made international headlines because of good news. This time was no different. A Salvadoran father and daughter had drowned in the Rio Grande attempting to cross into the United States.
